import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    mut c = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      c = x
    when None
      c = 32
    end
    let is_ws = c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn find(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  mut found = -1
  while i < n and found < 0
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v == target
        found = i
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found >= 0
    Some(found)
  else
    None
  end
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let trimmed = string.trim(line2)
let target = match string.parse_int(trimmed)
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

match find(nums, target)
when Some(idx)
  print("index=#{idx}")
when None
  print("not_found")
end
